description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a tiger, featuring a soft, fuzzy exterior with a pattern of orange-brown fur and dark brown stripes. The toy has a rounded head with small, rounded ears, a prominent white snout, and a pair of black stitched eyes. Its body is plump and proportionate, with short, stubby arms and legs, and white accents on the paws and cheeks. The toy's facial features are simple, giving it a gentle and approachable appearance. The surface texture appears velvety and soft, typical of children's plush toys. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the toy.
description: A soft, plush tiger stuffed toy with orange-brown fur, dark stripes, and white accents on the face and paws. It has a rounded, friendly appearance and simple stitched facial features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tiger's face, white snout, black eyes, and both arms and legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, snout, and the curvature of the body and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and the striped pattern across the back and arms.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the face, ear, and the shape of the body and limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and gentle, with small black eyes and a simple stitched snout. There is no visible mouth, giving it a calm and friendly appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly extended outward and legs apart, giving a balanced and approachable stance.
